hero.headline: TIRES THAT TAKE YOUR FURTHER
hero.description: Ben-Joe Tire Supply is a trusted auto shop in Makati City, offering high-quality surplus and brand new tires, as well as surplus rims. With a commitment to excellent service, we ensure that every customer leaves satisfied. Established in 2010, we pride ourselves on providing reliable and affordable solutions for all your tire needs.

gallery.headline: Featured Products
gallery.subheadline: Explore our top-of-the-line tire and rim offerings, carefully selected to provide you with the best driving experience

items.title: Surplus Tire Package
items.description: Our surplus tire package includes high-quality, gently used tires that have been thoroughly inspected to ensure safety and reliability. With a wide range of sizes available, we can fit any vehicle. Our team of experts will help you find the perfect tires for your needs.

testimonial.author: Mark Santos
testimonial.quote: I was impressed by the quality of the surplus tires I purchased from Ben-Joe Tire Supply. The price was unbeatable and the service was top-notch. I've already recommended them to my friends and family.

items.title: Brand New Tire Sale
items.description: Get the best brand new tires on the market at competitive prices. Our brand new tire sale features top brands and models, carefully selected to provide you with the best performance, safety, and fuel efficiency. Our knowledgeable staff will help you choose the perfect tires for your vehicle.

testimonial.author: Rachel Reyes
testimonial.quote: I recently purchased brand new tires from Ben-Joe Tire Supply and I'm extremely satisfied with the performance. The staff was knowledgeable and helpful, and the installation was quick and efficient.

items.title: Surplus Rim Package
items.description: Our surplus rim package includes high-quality, gently used rims in various sizes to fit your vehicle's needs. Our team of experts will help you find the perfect rims to match your tires and enhance your vehicle's appearance.

testimonial.author: Juan Lopez
testimonial.quote: I was looking for a unique set of rims for my car and Ben-Joe Tire Supply had exactly what I needed. The surplus rim package was affordable and the quality was exceptional. I'm very happy with my purchase.

contact.description: For any inquiries or to explore your vision further, we invite you to contact our professional team using the details provided below.
